TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gaston Browne ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Gaston Browne, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Antigua and barbuda ta' misuw hya' ga Gaston Browne, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: …£as~…ēton ő≤rowne rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, …£as~…ēton ő≤rowne, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw anti…£ua an* ő≤arő≤u*a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a …£as~…ēton ő≤rowne, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Gaston Browne ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 2, Gaston Browne, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Antigua and barbuda ta' misuw hya' ga Gaston Browne, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
